title: mcneillia graminifolia subsp. hungarica
intro: Mcneillia graminifolia subsp. hungarica, also known as Hungarian grass-leaved Mcneillia, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mcneillia graminifolia subsp. hungarica include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to support overall well-being and address specific health concerns.
